reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en el YPF full. Todo muy prolijo y limpio. Gran variedad de productos

Excellent service at the YPF store. Everything is very neat and clean. A wide variety of products.

reviews.comment:
La atención en bombas de carga es muy buena, no así en "Full" donde se vende caro y se atiende deficientemente.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the pumps is very good, but not at "Full" where it's expensive and the service is poor.
